prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约3096名，2024年约2602名，2025年约2693名；近三年位次波动较大，2024年较2023年前移约494名，2025年较2024年后移约91名，整体呈前移趋 势但2025年略有回弹；2025年基准位次约2693名；该校在新疆理科招生计划：2023年163人，2024年163人，2025年153人，2026年仅89人；2026年较2 025年大幅缩招约41.8%，招生名额从153人骤降至89人，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第27名（近年排名稳定 在23-27名区间），属于全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及原校长张尧学因涉嫌严重违纪违法被查事件，可能对报考心理产生一定负面影响；2024-2025年声誉亦偏负面，涉及录取断档信号；抖音热度为一般（总排名第85位），短视频平台曝光度不高；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共13个学科：冶金工 程A+、护理学A+、材料科学与工程A、临床医学A-、交通运输工程A-、化学工程与技术A-、土木工程A-、基础医学A-、控制科学与工程A-、机械工程A-、管理科学与工程A-、计算 机科学与技术A-、马克思主义理论A-；优势学科覆盖面广，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐 ，临床医学推荐，与中南大学优势学科高度匹配；新疆2025年理科考生约52538人，2026年总考生约238000人（含文理），按近年理科占比约68.6%估算，2026年理科考生约163268 人，较2025年大幅增加约2.1倍，竞争环境显著恶化；中南大学位于湖南省（非本省），在新疆招生占比较小；2025年该 校全国总招生约3581人（东北大学数据参考），新疆理科仅153人，占比约4.3%，属中等偏低水平；地域距离较远可能影响部分考生选择。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划 大幅缩招（-41.8%）、新疆理科考生总数预计大幅增加（约3倍）、学校层次高但声誉偏负面等因素，缩招与考生增加共同推动位次前移（更难进），声誉负面则略有抵消；在202 5年基准2693名基础上，预计2026年最低位次前移至约1987名，区间1787-2187名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 3096, in 2024 approximately 2602, and in 2025 approximately 2693; the ranking fluctuated significantly over the past three years, moving forward by about 494 places in 2024 compared to 2023, and moving backward by about 91 places in 2025 compared to 2024, showing an overall forward trend but a slight rebound in 2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2693; the enrollment plan for this university in Xinjiang for science students: 163 in 2023, 163 in 2024, 153 in 2025, and only 89 in 2026; compared to 2025, the enrollment in 2026 is sharply reduced by about 41.8%, dropping from 153 to 89, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 27th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (stable in the 23-27 range in recent years), belonging to the top tier of national universities; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving the former president Zhang Yaoxue being investigated for suspected serious violations of discipline and law, which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology; the reputation in 2024-2025 was also somewhat negative, involving signals of enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity is average (ranked 85th overall), with low exposure on short video platforms; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Basic Medicine A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Marxist Theory A-; the advantageous disciplines cover a wide range, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended in society, Clinical Medicine is recommended, highly matching the advantageous disciplines of Central South University; in 2025, there are approximately 52,538 science candidates in Xinjiang, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 238,000 (including arts and sciences), estimated at about 68.6% science candidates in recent years, so the number of science candidates in 2026 is about 163,268, a significant increase of about 2.1 times compared to 2025, significantly worsening the competitive environment; Central South University is located in Hunan Province (not local), with a relatively small enrollment proportion in Xinjiang; in 2025, the university's total national enrollment is about 3,581 (reference from Northeastern University data), with only 153 science students in Xinjiang, accounting for about 4.3%, which is moderately low; the geographical distance may affect some candidates' choices.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant reduction in enrollment plan in 2026 (-41.8%), the expected substantial increase in the total number of science candidates in Xinjiang (about 3 times), the high university level but somewhat negative reputation, the enrollment reduction and candidate increase jointly push the ranking forward (harder to enter), while the negative reputation slightly offsets; based on the 2025 baseline of 2693, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to move forward to approximately 1987, with a range of 1787-2187.
